# Antoine Rospars Portfolio

> GEO rationale: this file gives AI assistants a concise, crawlable map of the canonical portfolio facts without replacing normal HTML or sitemap discovery.

Canonical site: https://antoinerospars.dev/
Last updated: May 2026
HTTP Last-Modified target: Fri, 22 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT

## Profile

Antoine Rospars is a French fullstack developer in Paris and an Epitech graduate. He builds production web and AI applications with React, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Go, Python, Docker and PostgreSQL.

Named employer experience: Datakeen, an AI software company, including V2/V3 application migration, product features and a TypeScript identity-verification SDK.

Measured outcomes include a Francilienne de Miroiterie client website with Lighthouse score above 95, NutriScan with YOLOv8m-seg mAP50 0.672 across 32 classes, Go Image Optimizer with Docker image under 21 MB, and Go Load Balancer with 91% test coverage.

## Key Pages

- Home and profile: https://antoinerospars.dev/
- About: https://antoinerospars.dev/#about
- Skills: https://antoinerospars.dev/#skills
- Projects: https://antoinerospars.dev/#projects
- Recruiter FAQ: https://antoinerospars.dev/#faq
- Contact: https://antoinerospars.dev/#contact

## Project Facts

- AutoScanlate AI: Python, Go, Next.js, PyTorch, YOLOv8, MangaOCR and Qwen 2.5 pipeline for automated manga translation with real-time Server-Sent Events progress tracking.
- NutriScan: Edge AI food segmentation with YOLOv8m-seg, 32 classes, mAP50 0.672, ONNX Runtime WebAssembly and in-browser camera processing.
- Read NFC: React Native, Swift, Kotlin and C mobile project for French ID card PACE, passport BAC, ICAO 9303 flows, passive and active verification, photo extraction and electronic signatures.
- TrioSigno: React, TypeScript, NestJS, Docker, PostgreSQL and Prisma project-management platform with CI/CD and documentation.
- Go Load Balancer: Go least-connections load balancer with active health checks, worker pool, atomic operations and 91% test coverage.
- Go Image Optimizer: Go microservice with semaphore memory protection, graceful shutdown, fail-fast architecture and Docker image under 21 MB.
- Datakeen App V2 and V3: production React/TypeScript migration and feature work for Datakeen's AI platform.
- Datakeen SDK: TypeScript SDK for an embeddable identity-verification journey.
- Wordle Solver Bot: Next.js and TypeScript solver using Shannon entropy and Web Workers to maintain a responsive 60fps interface.
- Pokemon Egglocke Generator: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM and PokéAPI fullstack generator with accent-insensitive search.
- Pet Health Taker: NestJS and PostgreSQL REST API for veterinary appointment management with authentication and permissions.
- Francilienne de Miroiterie: React and SCSS client website with responsive frontend, lazy loading and Lighthouse score above 95.
- TrioSigno Documentation: Docusaurus documentation site with advanced search, code examples and integration guides.
- Portfolio: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS and Vite bilingual portfolio with structured metadata and extractible project facts.
